g.text: DOMINION
Encrypted access control for the decentralised web
Click anywhere to begin
Today, a platform sits between you and your people.
YOU
THEIR PLATFORM
YOUR PEOPLE
Your content passes through their servers. They hold the keys.
They can see, control, and leak your content.
They can change the rules overnight.
They can shut you down.
You don't own the relationship with your own people.
What if you didn't need the platform at all?
DECENTRALISED NETWORK — NO CENTRAL AUTHORITY
Your content lives on relays. No single point of control.
Your content. Encrypted on a decentralised network.
You choose who gets the key.
YOUR VAULT
FAMILY
FRIENDS
SUBSCRIBERS
NO KEY
New subscriber pays? Give them a key.
Directly. Peer to peer. No platform in the middle.
SUBSCRIBER
NEW
They can now decrypt your content. Instantly.
New week. New lock.
The encryption key rotates automatically every epoch.
Everyone who still has access gets a new key.
Old keys stop working. Forward secrecy, built in.
Lost trust? Stop giving them the key.
Next rotation, they're locked out. No platform needed.
FAMILY
FRIENDS
REVOKED
No appeal process. No customer support ticket. You decide.
No key? No access. Ever.
The content is on the network — but it's encrypted.
NO KEY
NO KEY
Anyone can see the vault exists. Nobody can read what's inside.
Not the relay operator. Not a hacker. Not even us.
DOMINION
Your content. Your keys. Your rules.
No middleman. No platform. No permission needed.
Encrypted access control for the decentralised web.
click to continue
